_doc: RANK-16 resolution sweep — LOW-RES half, runs on the 2080 Ti (fri-team-4, /media/ssd). Rerun of the resolution ablation at the new optimum LoRA rank 16 / alpha 32 (rank 16 beat rank 32 in the rank sweep). Only deltas vs the original rank-32 sweep_ablation_resolution.json: lora_rank 16, lora_alpha 32. Per-epoch val stays on the default 10% IMD split (cheap, drives early-stop, matches the original sweep) — the FULL IMD set is reported only in the eval sweep (sweep_r16_eval_resolution_*), where imd_val_split=1.0 runs once per checkpoint. base_dtype/amp_dtype left at fp32 defaults to match the original sweep exactly and keep this half on the same resolution curve as the Ada high-res half. Effective batch 8 everywhere (recipe-identical, 375 steps/epoch). Launch: GPU=1 RUNS_ROOT=/media/ssd/runs/ablation bash run_scripts/run_ablation_resolution.sh (point its --queue at this file).
